message.content:
@startuml
participant "Dispatcher" as Dispatcher1 #D3D3D3
participant "JobManagerRunner_JobMaster" as JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1 #E6E6FA
participant "SchedulerNG" as SchedulerNG1 #F0FFFF

note over Dispatcher1, JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1 : jobManagerRunnerFactory.createJobManagerRunner()
activate Dispatcher1
->> JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1: createJobManagerRunner()
deactivate Dispatcher1

note right of JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1 : SlotPoolServiceSchedulerFactory.createScheduler(SlotProvider)
activate JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1
--> SchedulerNG1: createScheduler(slotProvider)
deactivate JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1

@enduml
